tags.documentation: RH signal is our of range
tags.name: Input_RH_Out_Range

tags.documentation: Steam demand as a percentage of the humidifier's total capacity
tags.name: Steam_Demand_Percent

tags.documentation: Re-filling is taking too long; top probe is not in contact with water
tags.name: Refill_Time_Excessive

tags.documentation: When set will clear all active faults
tags.name: Clear_All_Active_Alarms

tags.documentation: P_Motor block fail to start status
tags.name: Sts_FailToRun

tags.documentation: Duct RH signal is out of range; sensor may be faulty
tags.name: Duct_RH_Out_Range

tags.documentation: Mode of the unit or system. The define options for writing are: 1-Auto, 2-Local standby, 3-System standby, 4-Manual drain; and the following options in addition to read: 5-Test outputs, 6-Test run
tags.name: Run_Mode

tags.documentation: Drain valve has been open for the prescribed amount of time based on the humidifier model, and the water is still touching the low water probe
tags.name: Tank_Not_Draining

tags.documentation: Mode of the unit or system. The define options for writing are: 1-Auto, 2-Local standby, 3-System standby, 4-Manual drain; and the following options in addition to read: 5-Test outputs, 6-Test run
tags.expression:
CASE(
{[.]Run_Mode},
1,"Auto", 
2,"Local standby", 
3,"System standby", 
4,"Manual drain",
5,"Test outputs", 
6,"Test run",
"Unknown")
tags.name: Run_Mode_Desc

tags.documentation: Water probe readings are suspect, likely caused by scale on probe
tags.name: Water_Probe_Faulty

tags.documentation: Fill valve has been on too long during initial tank fill; bottom probe is not in contact with water
tags.name: Fill_Time_Excessive

tags.documentation: Water probe head is dirty, faulty, or miswired
tags.name: Water_Probe_Check

tags.documentation: Humidity set point for the space being humidified
tags.name: Relative_Humidity_SP

tags.documentation: Humidifier continues to add water when there is no demand, signifying humidifier is continuing to make steam; Humidifier is put into a keep-cool state where fill and drain cycles operate to keep tank water from boiling
tags.name: Boil_Time_Excessive

tags.documentation: Temperature of the water in the humidifier's evaporating chamber
tags.name: Water_Temp

tags.documentation: Fault occurs at boiling temperature plus 25 °F; All units are put into a keep cool state where fill and drain cycles operate to keep tank cool
tags.name: Tank_Overtemp

tags.documentation: Flag that a manual clear alarm exists in the system
tags.name: Manual_Clear_Alarms_Exist

tags.documentation: Estimated amount of steam the humidifier is producing as a percentage of the humidifier's total capacity
tags.name: Steam_Output_Percent

tags.documentation: Relative humidiy content of air in the space being humidified
tags.name: Space_Humidity

tags.documentation: Normally open dry contact that activates whenver there is an alert, which does not auto-clear
tags.name: Prog_Output1_Status_NO
